about

My name is zane worthington

Here are a few facts about me:

I was born in pontiac and grew up in southern california. I now live and go to school in santa barbara. i go to school for english and french. i have aspirations of becoming a teacher or proffesor of language.

i have extensive knowledge of the adobe and affinity creation suites. as well as knowledge of multiple digital audio workstations. in my free time i create music or digital art. recently i have been learning how to draw as an extension of my design work. i also work on a tabletop-roleplaying game as the lead graphics designer.
